purpose: Define the minimum commercialization-readiness contract that governance must evaluate before a service is called launch-ready or promotable toward v1.
hard_rules: Launch readiness must not pass if the service value unit is still undefined.
Governance must evaluate the buyer problem statement, not only technical completeness.
A commercialization path may exist before live revenue, but repeatability must still be stated.
Revenue evidence refs must remain reviewable, even when they point to pilot or adoption conversations.
Operator reliance must be explicit before version promotion is granted.
